proof:
calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using (abs_add (3 * x) h)
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by
      simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := by
        have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
      exact le_of_lt this
failed_attempts:
have hh1 : |h| ≤ 1 := by
    have : |h| < 1 := by
      have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
    exact le_of_lt this
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := by
    simpa [mul_assoc, abs_mul, abs_of_nat] using (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := this
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul] using (congrArg (fun t => |t|) (show (3:ℝ) * x = 3 * x by ring))
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
  have hh' : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
  have hh'' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := this
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      simpa [hx, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using add_le_add_left hh'' (|3 * x|)

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul] using (show |(3:ℝ) * x| = |(3:ℝ)| * |x| from abs_mul (3:ℝ) x)
  have hh' : |h| ≤ 1 := by
    have hhδ : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    have hh1 : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hhδ δ_le1
    exact le_of_lt hh1
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have : |3 * x| + |h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
        simpa [hx] using add_le_add (le_rfl) hh'
      exact this

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simpa [abs_mul, abs_ofNat]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
      exact le_of_lt this

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using (abs_add (3 * x) h)
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have : |h| ≤ 1 := by
        have hh' : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
        exact le_of_lt hh'
      linarith

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simpa [abs_mul, abs_ofNat]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := by
        have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
      exact le_of_lt this

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (0:ℝ) ≤ 3 by norm_num)]
  have hh' : |h| ≤ 1 := by
    have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
    simpa [sub_zero] using this.le
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [add_comm] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      simpa [hx, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using add_le_add (le_of_eq hx) hh'

calc
    |3 * x + h| = |3 * x| + |h| := by
      have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [add_comm] using abs_add (3 * x) h
      have : |3 * x| + |h| ≤ |3 * x + h| := by
        simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
          (sub_eq_add_neg (3 * x + h) (3 * x) ▸ (abs_sub_le_iff.1 (by rfl)).2)
      exact le_antisymm this (by simpa [add_comm] using abs_add (3 * x) h)
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have hh' : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
      have hh'' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
      have : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by simpa [abs_mul] using congrArg (fun t => |t|) (by ring : (3:ℝ) * x = 3 * x)
      simpa [this, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using add_le_add_left hh'' (|3 * x|)

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 3)]
  have hh' : |h| ≤ 1 := by
    have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa using hh) δ_le1
    exact le_of_lt this
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using abs_add (3 * x) h
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := by
    simpa [hx] using (le_trans this (by gcongr))
  exact le_trans this (by gcongr)

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
      exact le_of_lt this

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul, abs_ofNat]
  have hh' : |h| ≤ 1 := by
    have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa using hh) δ_le1
    exact le_of_lt this
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      simpa [hx, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using add_le_add (le_rfl) hh'

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (show (0:ℝ) < 3 by norm_num)]
  have hh' : |h| ≤ 1 := by
    have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
    have : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt this
    simpa [sub_zero] using this
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [add_comm] using abs_add (3 * x) h
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := this
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simpa [hx]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
      exact le_of_lt this

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using (abs_add (3 * x) h)
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by
      simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have hh' : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
      have : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
      exact add_le_add_left this _

have hh' : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this hδ
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [abs_add] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr; exact le_of_lt hh'

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
      exact le_of_lt this

have hh' : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa [sub_zero] using hh
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
  have hh'' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
  have hx : |3 * x| ≤ 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 3 by norm_num)]
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [add_comm] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by linarith
successful_attempts:
calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using (abs_add (3 * x) h)
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by
      simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := by
        have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
      exact le_of_lt this

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul] using (abs_mul (3:ℝ) x)
  have hh1 : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this hδ
  have hh2 : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh1
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := this
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      simpa [hx] using add_le_add (le_rfl : |3 * x| ≤ |3 * x|) hh2

have hh' : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
    simpa using this
  have hh'' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
  calc
    |3 * x + h| = |3 * x + h| := rfl
    _ ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr

have hh' : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
    simpa using this
  have hx : |3 * x| ≤ 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul] using (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_rfl : |x| ≤ |x|) (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 3))
  have habs : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [add_comm] using (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := le_trans habs (add_le_add_right hx _)
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := le_trans this (add_le_add_left (le_of_lt hh') _)
  simpa using this

have hh1 : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
  have hh1' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh1
  have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul] using (abs_mul 3 x)
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := this
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [hx]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr

have hx : |3 * x| ≤ 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (show (0:ℝ) < 3 by norm_num)]
  have hh' : |h| ≤ 1 := by
    have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa using hh) δ_le1
    exact le_of_lt this
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      nlinarith

have hh' : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this hδ
  have hh'' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr

calc
    |3 * x + h| = |3 * x + (h - 0)| := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ |3 * x| + |h - 0| := by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using abs_add (3 * x) (h - 0)
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have hh' : |h - 0| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
      have hh'le : |h - 0| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
      have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by simpa [abs_mul] using (abs_mul 3 x)
      nlinarith [hh'le, hx]

have hh' : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
  have hhle : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
      simpa [add_comm] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by
      simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := by
        have hh' : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
        have : δ ≤ 1 := δ_le1
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le hh' this
      exact le_of_lt this

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul] using (abs_mul 3 x)
  have hlt : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
  have hle : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hlt
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := this
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [hx]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by
      simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 3 by norm_num)]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa using hh) δ_le1
      exact le_of_lt this

have : |h| ≤ 1 := by
    have : |h| < 1 := by
      have hh' : |h| < δ := by simpa using hh
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le hh' δ_le1
    exact le_of_lt this
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by simpa [add_comm] using abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simp [abs_mul]
  have hh' : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| = |h - 0| := by simpa
    have : |h - 0| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1
    simpa [this] using this
  have hh_le : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (3 * x) h
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := this
    _ ≤ |3 * x| + 1 := by gcongr
    _ = 3 * |x| + 1 := by simp [hx, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]

have hx : |3 * x| = 3 * |x| := by
    simpa [abs_mul] using (abs_mul 3 x)
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := by
    simpa [add_comm] using (abs_add h (3 * x))
  have hh' : |h| < 1 := by
    have : |h| = |h - 0| := by simpa
    have : |h| < δ := by simpa [this] using hh
    have : |h| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le this δ_le1
    exact this
  have hh'' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hh'
  have : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := this
      _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by simpa [hx]
      _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by gcongr
  exact this
